summary: Defines the continuity record that lets the root consumer reuse the same continuity-bearing thread by default and open successors only when subject identity, discourse office, or contradiction law requires it.

fieldDefinitions.continuityKey: Machine-visible key for a continuity-bearing lane subject.
fieldDefinitions.currentThreadId: The currently active thread identity for this continuity key.
fieldDefinitions.lastAppendixId: The most recent appendix that lawfully updated the continuity record.
fieldDefinitions.lastStandingHash: Stable hash for the last consumed standing summary.
fieldDefinitions.sealed: True when the current thread has been sealed and may not receive further appendices.
fieldDefinitions.successorThreadId: Successor thread identity when the current thread has been lawfully succeeded.
fieldDefinitions.successorReason: Explicit reason the current thread was succeeded or broken.
fieldDefinitions.discourseOffice: The office that currently owns this continuity thread.
fieldDefinitions.subjectKey: Machine-visible subject identity tracked by the continuity thread.
fieldDefinitions.lastResolvedAtUtc: UTC timestamp for the last continuity resolution.

successorWhen: the prior thread is sealed and succeeded
